document.source_title: Amid PM visit, Netherlands returns Chola-era plates after 14-yr diplomatic effort

claims.claim_text: The Chola plates were returned to India after a 14-year diplomatic effort.
claims.evidence_text: the 11th century Chola plates were handed over to India by the Netherlands on Saturday during Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s visit, marking a significant milestone in New Delhi’s pitch for restitution of colonial pillage.

entities.name: Chola Copper Plates
entities.description: A set of 21 large plates and 3 small plates containing texts in Tamil and Sanskrit, originating from the 11th century.
entities.evidence_text: The Chola Copper Plates are a set of 21 large plates and 3 small plates and largely contain texts in Tamil.

entities.name: Narendra Modi
entities.description: Prime Minister of India who was present during the return of the Chola plates.
entities.evidence_text: the 11th century Chola plates were handed over to India by the Netherlands on Saturday during Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s visit.

entities.name: Leiden University
entities.description: The institution that held the Chola plates since 1862 and conducted the provenance investigation.
entities.evidence_text: the plates — in the possession of Leiden University since 1862 — will be returned to India.

events.event: Return of Chola Copper Plates to India
events.evidence_text: the 11th century Chola plates were handed over to India by the Netherlands on Saturday during Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s visit.

citations.title: Amid PM visit, Netherlands returns Chola-era plates after 14-yr diplomatic effort
citations.evidence_text: the 11th century Chola plates were handed over to India by the Netherlands on Saturday during Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s visit.

source_credibility.reason: The source is a reputable news outlet providing detailed coverage of the event.
